title: Mumeok image brand assets
summary: 선택한 파란 무먹 심볼을 header, favicon, 설치/Apple 아이콘, OG/Twitter metadata에 적용하고 기존 이름·동작·API/DB 계약을 보존한다.
goal: 사용자가 앱·웹·브라우저·설치·공유 surface에서 같은 공식 무먹 이미지 브랜드를 보되 기존 HOME 이름 학습 위계와 서비스 동작은 그대로 유지한다.

owners.claude: replaced for this follow-up by the existing user-approved Codex-only service-brand exception; global workflow actors are unchanged
owners.codex: role-separated work owns Stage 1 docs, Stage 4 implementation, Stage 5/6 review, docs repair, and final authority; authoring and implementation work cannot self-approve

dependencies: canonical image exports merged through image-only PR #996
out_of_scope: Screenshot, unselected candidate, quote, dot, decoration, or mascot variants
Symbol redraw, recolor, aspect-ratio distortion, or corner reprocessing
New dependency, font, token, English brand, API, DB, auth, route, interaction, or domain state change
Technical identifier rename or historical official version, workpack, prototype, or evidence edit
